description_long: This object is a claw hammer with a modern, ergonomic design, featuring a predominantly black handle with red accents. The handle is slightly curved and appears to be made of a durable composite material with a rubberized grip for comfort and slip resistance. The head of the hammer is metallic, with a rounded striking face on one end and a sharply curved claw on the other for nail removal. The transition between the handle and the head is reinforced with visible fasteners, suggesting robust construction. The overall form is streamlined, with the handle tapering towards the end for better control and leverage. The color contrast between the red and black elements gives it a contemporary, professional appearance suitable for urban toolkits.
description: A modern claw hammer with a black and red ergonomic handle and a metallic head featuring a striking face and a curved claw.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the hammer, highlighting the curved handle, red grip, and the metallic head with a visible claw.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the narrow profile of the handle and the alignment of the head and claw.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle's curvature, red grip, and the metallic head with the claw facing the other direction.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the rounded striking face of the hammer and the symmetry of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Curved, ergonomic handle with rubberized and plastic grip sections, designed for comfort and slip resistance.
attribute_jaw_design: Not applicable; this object is a hammer, not pliers, and features a striking face and a curved claw instead of jaws.
attribute_pivot_mechanism: Fixed; the head is securely attached to the handle with no moving or adjustable parts.
attribute_grip_pattern: Rubberized grip with visible textured and contoured sections for enhanced hold.
